text: Some people will think it will only affect one child in their union so they let it go.

text: The people migrated from the north-eastern African town of Timbuktu in the ancient Western Sudan Empire to their present land in the central coast of Ghana.

label: Laafi lʋgir minista la bɛ suori mukid ye o gun'e nintʋʋlʋm ban' la.

text: Colonel Harland David Sanders was born on March 9, 1890 in the United States.
